rationale: Educ. Code §28.003 governs educational program access and student transfers within a district. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax revenue, or funding thresholds. No conflict with the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote: If the parents or guardians of at least 22 students at a school request a transfer for the same school year to another school in the district for the purpose of enrolling in an educational program offered at that school, beginning with the following school year the district shall:
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. §28.003 is operationally unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
